steps.t: The Dance Leader is in Duillond near the stables. Wait for the Elf dance-celebration to begin and follow the instructions of the Dance Leader.

The Dance Leader is in Duillond near the stables. Having completed the dance steps required, speak to the Dance Leader to learn the dance of the Elves…
